title: Unique Dark Vanilla
description: UI with unique texture for every functional block(Dark and Light versions are available)
body:
<center>

![Unique Dark Vanilla](https://github.com/AmongstReality/SomeImages/blob/main/UniqueDarkVanilla/Title-smaller.png?raw=true)

</center>

<center>
  
[![CurseForge](https://github.com/AmongstReality/SomeImages/blob/main/UniqueDarkVanilla/btn-curseforge.png?raw=true)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/unique-dark-vanilla)
[![Modrinth](https://github.com/AmongstReality/SomeImages/blob/main/UniqueDarkVanilla/btn-modrinth.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark-vanilla)
    
</center>
<hr>

New version of **[Unique Dark](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/unique-dark)**. This time in vanilla Minecraft style.
This resource pack will receive all of the mod support, original resource pack has, over time.

You can support me and get full version of the resource pack on **[Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/c/AmongstReality)** and **[Buy Me a Coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/amongstreality)**:

<center>

[![Patreon](https://github.com/AmongstReality/SomeImages/blob/main/UniqueDarkVanilla/Patreon.png?raw=true)](https://www.patreon.com/c/AmongstReality)
[![Buy Me a Coffee](https://github.com/AmongstReality/SomeImages/blob/main/UniqueDarkVanilla/BuyMeACoffe.png?raw=true)](https://buymeacoffee.com/amongstreality)

</center>

**Free version** includes next textures:
- Crafting table
- Furnace
- Chest
- Enchanting table
- Anvil
- Shulker
- Recipe book

Everything else is just dark mode.

**Full version** includes next textures:
- Crafting table
- Furnace
- Blast furnace
- Smoker
- Chest
- Ender chest
- Barrel
- Enchanting table
- Anvil
- Shulker
- Colored shulkers
- Smithing table
- Stonecutter
- Grindstone
- Cartography table
- Brewing stand
- Beacon
- Loom
- Dropper
- Dispenser
- Hopper
- Crafter
- Villager
- Recipe book

<center>

![Mod Support](https://github.com/AmongstReality/SomeImages/blob/main/UniqueDarkVanilla/ModSupport-outlined.png?raw=true)

</center>

- [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements)
- [JEI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei)
- [Language Reload](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/language-reload)
- [Mod Menu](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modmenu)
- [Roughly Enough Items (REI)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/roughly-enough-items)


<details>

Author AmongstReality

Links to pages of the author on different platforms:

- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/AmongstReality)
- [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/amongstreality/)

When you can use my assets:
- In public Modpacks on Modrinth/CurseForge.
- If you want to add mod support as an addon for the resource pack. If you do that, you have to add clear credit that includes links to the original resource pack.
- Any private modifications of the original resource pack.

When you can NOT use my assets:
- Distribution on the Bedrock Marketplace.
- Locking behind a paywall (e.g. Patreon).
- Distribution of original/modified assets on any platforms.

Links to the resource pack's pages on different platforms:
- [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/unique-dark-vanilla)
- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark-vanilla)

</details>
